content: Sent invites to all 4 of you just now!

I believe I may have had a breakthrough in how to make my repo easier to automate, but it'll take some time to set up & implement, and I might not be able to fold in volunteer contributions until the end. I'll work on it whenever I have time but please be patient with me <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
if it works out though, I may have a way to automatically update all the files in the repo with new source sheets whenever we get them, and auto-compile many volunteer files at once!
Turns out Excel is a powerful program, who would have thought?
